headline: Anthropic's regulatory misstep signals deeper healthcare AI governance gaps
body: Anthropic faced EU backlash after sending a junior staffer to testify before European Parliament officials about AI safety, undermining the company's credibility on a critical regulatory stage. For healthcare AI vendors, this incident exposes how seriously regulators are scrutinizing governance claims and safety commitments as AI systems integrate into clinical workflows. Healthcare organizations evaluating foundation models for EHR integration or clinical decision support should treat regulatory engagement depth as a core vendor assessment criterion. As Anthropic pursues IPO and implementation partnerships across industries, healthcare buyers need assurance that safety protocols receive board-level attention, not delegation to entry-level personnel.
